name: Canadian Provolone Mushroom Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces mushrooms, canned, sliced and drained
12 slices canadian bacon, cut 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the rolls and set aside the tops to accompany the open-faced sandwiches.
2. In a 2-cup glass measuring cup, combine the bacon, onion, and mushrooms. Cook uncovered in the microwave oven for about 2 minutes at HIGH or until the onion is tender. Stir once during cooking.
3. Arrange 2 slices of Canadian bacon on each roll.
4. Top each piece with the bacon-mushroom mixture.
5. Place a slice of provolone cheese on top.
6. Put one green pepper ring on each cheese slice and sprinkle paprika inside the ring.
7. Place the sandwiches on paper towels or a roasting rack. Cover and heat uncovered in the microwave oven for 4 minutes at MEDIUM until the cheese starts to melt and the meat is hot.
8. Serve.
